---
title: "AI in Agriculture | Free MOOC by ICAR NAARM"
date: "2026-03-01"
description: "Learn AI, ML & Deep Learning for agricultural applications."
image: "../images/agrimooc.jpg"
categories: [Upcoming]
---

**Artificial Intelligence in Agriculture**  
*March 1–31, 2026 | Online*  

Learn AI, ML & Deep Learning for agricultural applications. Covers Python programming, image processing, and hands-on AI tools for agriculture. Free access with optional certification.  

**Registration Deadline:** March 7, 2026  
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Course Portal](https://elearning.naarm.org.in/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i> Register Now](https://docs.google.com/forms/u/0/d/e/1FAIpQLSeflelQGrveulu5BD-RYydU_GHKl4UqJokd9Hxku4oRkeyEZw/alreadyresponded?usp=send_form){.social-btn}
